transcript: Hi this is Leon from Apex Roofing, I noticed you had some storm damage in the area. We offer free inspections. Is this a good time?
Leave a message at the tone and someone will get back to you shortly.
We are not interested, please remove us from your list.
Yes, let's book an appointment. What time works tomorrow?
Press 1 for sales, press 2 for support, para espanol marque tres.
